comment: The test cases cover all execution paths in the provided Rust functions. Specifically, for make_u0060u007b_u0060u002c_u0060u007d, they trigger both the 'if' (a1 <= a2) and 'else' (a1 > a2) branches using distinct and equal values. For ex3, the inputs are chosen to demonstrate cases where n + m is less than, equal to, or greater than n * m, effectively exercising the underlying logic in the helper function. Direct calls to ex1 and ex2 ensure those simple constant-returning functions are also covered.
